title: Welcome to Your Cambridge Primary English Book!

questions.question: What does "Learner's Book" mean?
options: An updated or revised version of a book, often with improvements or new content.
A textbook specifically designed for students to learn from, filled with lessons and activities.
People who manage and guide the creation of a whole set of books to ensure they are consistent and high quality.
questions.correct_answer: A textbook specifically designed for students to learn from, filled with lessons and activities.
questions.explanation: "Learner's Book" means: A textbook specifically designed for students to learn from, filled with lessons and activities.

questions.question: What does "Second Edition" mean?
options: A textbook specifically designed for students to learn from, filled with lessons and activities.
An updated or revised version of a book, often with improvements or new content.
People who manage and guide the creation of a whole set of books to ensure they are consistent and high quality.
questions.correct_answer: An updated or revised version of a book, often with improvements or new content.
questions.explanation: "Second Edition" means: An updated or revised version of a book, often with improvements or new content.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: The cover introduces you to your main ______ textbook for the year.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "The cover introduces you to your main English textbook for the year."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: It also names the authors who created your learning materials.
The cover introduces you to your main English textbook for the year.
It shows the book's title, subject, and the stage it's designed for.
It has no special meaning in writing.
questions.correct_answer: It shows the book's title, subject, and the stage it's designed for.
questions.explanation: Correct! "It shows the book's title, subject, and the stage it's designed for." is one of the key things to remember.

A textbook specifically designed for students to learn from, filled with lessons and activities.
questions.correct_answer: People who manage and guide the creation of a whole set of books to ensure they are consistent and high quality.
questions.explanation: "Series editors" means: People who manage and guide the creation of a whole set of books to ensure they are consistent and high quality.
